nasb.text: Her priests also I will clothe with salvation, And her godly ones will sing aloud for joy.

esv.text: Her priests I will clothe with salvation, and her saints will shout for joy.

cnv.text: 我要使祭司都披上救恩， 使聖民都大大歡呼。

ccb.text: 我要用救恩作她祭司的衣裳， 城里忠心的子民必高声欢唱。

csbs.text: 我要使她的祭司们披上救恩， 使她的忠信者大大欢呼。
